LanguageData.FB_GrowFingerspikeFromHemogel.label: grow fingerspike from hemogel
LanguageData.FB_GrowFingerspikeFromHemogel.descriptio: Grows a fingerspike directly from the organ's hemogel reserve.
LanguageData.FB_GrowTrispikeFromHemogel.label: grow trispike from hemogel
LanguageData.FB_GrowTrispikeFromHemogel.description: Grows a trispike directly from the organ's hemogel reserve.
LanguageData.FB_GrowToughspikeFromHemogel.label: grow toughspike from hemogel
LanguageData.FB_GrowToughspikeFromHemogel.description: Grows a toughspike directly from the organ's hemogel reserve.
LanguageData.FB_GrowBulbfreakFromHemogel.label: grow bulbfreak from hemogel
LanguageData.FB_GrowBulbfreakFromHemogel.description: Grows a bulbfreak directly from the organ's hemogel reserve.
LanguageData.FB_MergeTrispike.label: merge trispike
LanguageData.FB_MergeTrispike.description: Assembles a trispike from an allowed combination of lesser fleshbeasts.
LanguageData.FB_MergeToughspike.label: merge toughspike
LanguageData.FB_MergeToughspike.description: Assembles a toughspike from an allowed combination of lesser fleshbeasts.
LanguageData.FB_MergeBulbfreak.label: merge bulbfreak
LanguageData.FB_MergeBulbfreak.description: Assembles a bulbfreak from an allowed combination of spine fleshbeasts.
LanguageData.FB_MergeDreadmeld.label: merge dreadmeld
LanguageData.FB_MergeDreadmeld.description: Assembles a dreadmeld from an allowed combination of fleshbeasts.
LanguageData.FB_AssembleSegmentedBastion.label: assemble segmented bastion
LanguageData.FB_AssembleSegmentedBastion.description: Orders expendable spine fleshbeasts to merge into a complete segmented bastion.
LanguageData.FB_AssembleAcidBroodmother.label: assemble acid broodmother
LanguageData.FB_AssembleAcidBroodmother.description: Orders expendable spine fleshbeasts to merge into an acid broodmother.
LanguageData.FB_AssembleDevourer.label: assemble devourer
LanguageData.FB_AssembleDevourer.description: Orders expendable spine fleshbeasts to merge into an armored devourer.
LanguageData.FB_GrowCortexMiteFromSkillEssence.label: grow cortex mite from skill essence
LanguageData.FB_GrowCortexMiteFromSkillEssence.descri: Grows a cortex mite from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowBurdenBlobFromSkillEssence.label: grow burden blob from skill essence
LanguageData.FB_GrowBurdenBlobFromSkillEssence.descri: Grows a burden blob from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowCarapaceExcavatorFromSkillEssence: grow carapace excavator from skill essence
Grows a carapace excavator from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowScrapmeldNestlingFromSkillEssence: grow scrapmeld nestling from skill essence
Grows a scrapmeld nestling from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowSinewcallerFromSkillEssence.label: grow sinewcaller from skill essence
LanguageData.FB_GrowSinewcallerFromSkillEssence.descr: Grows a sinewcaller from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowGraftmawFromSkillEssence.label: grow graftmaw from skill essence
LanguageData.FB_GrowGraftmawFromSkillEssence.descript: Grows a graftmaw from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowCocoonbackFromSkillEssence.label: grow cocoonback from skill essence
LanguageData.FB_GrowCocoonbackFromSkillEssence.descri: Grows a cocoonback from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowNerveclotFromSkillEssence.label: grow nerveclot from skill essence
LanguageData.FB_GrowNerveclotFromSkillEssence.descrip: Grows a nerveclot from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowThrallbloomFromSkillEssence.label: grow thrallbloom from skill essence
LanguageData.FB_GrowThrallbloomFromSkillEssence.descr: Grows a thrallbloom from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowFleshIntruderFromSkillEssence.lab: grow flesh intruder from skill essence
LanguageData.FB_GrowFleshIntruderFromSkillEssence.des: Grows a one-use flesh intruder from hemogel and stored skill essence.
LanguageData.FB_GrowFerrimawFromSkillEssence.label: grow ferrimaw from skill essence
LanguageData.FB_GrowFerrimawFromSkillEssence.descript: Grows a ferrimaw from hemogel and stored skill essence.
